tasks.description: Add task type filter to orchestrator pre-assignment validation
tasks.context: In backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts, add taskTypeFilter function before assignTaskToAgent. Filter out 'docs' and 'adr' types. Return validation error for non-executable task types. Prevents MiniMax receiving documentation tasks.

tasks.description: Implement complexity scoring in task validator
tasks.context: In backend/src/services/task-complexity-validator.ts, add calculateComplexityScore function. Score based on: context length (>500 chars = high), multi-file changes (>1 file = high), vague requirements. Return score 1-10. Reject tasks scoring >7.

tasks.description: Add early validation gate in orchestrator task ingestion
tasks.context: In backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts, add validateTaskBeforeQueue function at sprint ingestion. Call task-complexity-validator before queueing. Reject and log invalid tasks immediately. Prevents invalid tasks entering execution pipeline.

tasks.description: Add quality gate config for task validation thresholds
tasks.context: In backend/src/services/quality-gate-config.ts, add taskValidation section. Define: maxContextLength=500, maxFileCount=1, minSpecificity=0.7, blockedTypes=['docs','adr']. Export as TASK_QUALITY_GATES constant for orchestrator consumption.

tasks.description: Integrate quality gates into orchestrator validation flow
tasks.context: In backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts, import TASK_QUALITY_GATES from quality-gate-config. Update validateTaskBeforeQueue to use gate thresholds. Apply maxContextLength, maxFileCount checks. Log rejection reasons with gate violations.

tasks.description: Add error handling for validation rejections in orchestrator
tasks.context: In backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts, wrap validation calls in try-catch. On validation failure, emit 'task.rejected' event with reason. Update task status to 'rejected' in database. Prevents silent failures causing cascade skips.
